title: Center labels in single-icon 2D nodes
description: Single-icon 2D nodes now keep the label centered on the component instead of centering it in the remaining text area to the right of the icon.
decision_notes: Kept the existing icon width reservation so labels still have clearance from 1.8x icons.
Changed only the single-icon label anchor; collapsed abstraction icon grids continue using their existing offset label behavior.
Added a regression assertion that iconed node labels are anchored at the node center.
verification: Browser check at http://127.0.0.1:4174/examples/demo.html confirmed iconed node labels have zero delta from node center and at least roughly 20px clearance from icon right edges.
